$comment: Single source of truth for active experiments. Each entry under `experiments` must have: owner (string), hypothesis (string), start_date (ISO date), decision_date (ISO date), primary_metric (string, e.g. 'affiliate_link_click'), files (array of paths that read the flag). Auto-audited by scripts/audit-feature-flags.mjs which cross-references PostHog flags against this registry and the codebase to flag drift (registered-but-unused, used-but-unregistered, past decision_date).

reviews-modern-v1.hypothesis: A modern, editorial restyle of /reviews (warm paper palette, Fraunces+Inter, border-first cards, orange-only CTAs, fixed Check-Price/card alignment) holds or lifts affiliate CTR while improving perceived credibility and scroll depth.

home-modern-v1.hypothesis: A modern homepage hero and sections (solid Fraunces headline with single green accent, border-first dual-pathway cards, parallax removed) hold or lift engagement and downstream affiliate CTR vs the current gradient hero.

guide-modern-v1.hypothesis: A modern, editorial restyle of /guide (warm paper palette, Fraunces+Inter, border-first cards, orange-only CTAs) holds or lifts affiliate CTR and engagement vs the current control layout.

research-modern-v1.hypothesis: A modern, editorial restyle of /research (warm paper palette, Fraunces+Inter, border-first cards, orange-only CTAs) holds or lifts engagement and downstream affiliate CTR vs the current control layout.

compare-modern-v1.hypothesis: A modern, editorial restyle of /compare (warm paper palette, Fraunces+Inter, border-first cards, orange-only CTAs) holds or lifts affiliate CTR and engagement vs the current control comparison layout.

never-hungover-modern-v1.hypothesis: A modern, editorial restyle of /never-hungover (warm paper palette, Fraunces+Inter, border-first cards, orange-only CTAs) holds or lifts engagement and downstream affiliate CTR vs the current control listing layout.
